versions.version_description: Full song with riff, chords, solo and lyrics.
All lyrics with their accompanying correctly named chords. Tablature of main riff and Bridge section. Full lyrics for Coda https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gF5LaVkDhyk.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Standard Tuning EADGBe

No Capo

[tab]Intro:
   [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]B[/ch]
e|--------------------------------------|
B|--------------------------------------|
G|--------------------------------------|
D|------2------2---------2----1-2-1-----|
A|----4------4--4------4----2-------2---|
E|--2------2------2--5------------------| (x2)[/tab]

Verse 1: 
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
She says her love for me could never die[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
But that'd change if she ever found out about you and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, but her love is cold, it wouldn't hurt her if she didn't know, 'cause[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
When it gets too much, I need to feel your touch[/tab]

Chorus 1:
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]B[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
Cause when the feeling's right I'm gonna run all night[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you[/tab]

[Instrumental Break - Intro]

Verse 2:
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
She's got a heart of gold she'd never let me down[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
But you're the one that always turns me on, you keep me coming round[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I know her love is true, but it's so damn easy making love to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
I got my mind made up, I need to feel your touch[/tab]
